2604.12152.title: Domain-Specific Latent Representations Improve the Fidelity of Diffusion-Based Medical Image Super-Resolution
2604.12152.paper_summary: Latent diffusion models for medical image super-resolution universally inherit variational autoencoders designed for natural photographs. We show that this default choice, not the diffusion architecture, is the dominant constraint on reconstruction quality. In a controlled experiment holding all other pipeline components fixed, replacing the generic Stable Diffusion VAE with MedVAE, a domain-specific autoencoder pretrained on more than 1.6 million medical images, yields +2.91 to +3.29 dB PSNR improvement across knee MRI, brain MRI, and chest X-ray (n = 1,820; Cohen's d = 1.37 to 1.86, all p < 10^{-20}, Wilcoxon signed-rank). Wavelet decomposition localises the advantage to the finest spatial frequency bands encoding anatomically relevant fine structure. Ablations across inference schedules, prediction targets, and generative architectures confirm the gap is stable within plus or minus 0.15 dB, while hallucination rates remain comparable between methods (Cohen's h < 0.02 across all datasets), establishing that reconstruction fidelity and generative hallucination are governed by independent pipeline components. These results provide a practical screening criterion: autoencoder reconstruction quality, measurable without diffusion training, predicts downstream SR performance (R^2 = 0.67), suggesting that domain-specific VAE selection should precede diffusion architecture search. Code and trained model weights are publicly available at https://github.com/sebasmos/latent-sr.
2604.12152.paper_summary_zh: 潛在擴散模型在醫學影像超解析度中普遍繼承了為自然照片設計的變分自編碼器。我們展示了這一默認選擇，而非擴散架構，是重建質量的主要限制。在一個控制實驗中，固定所有其他流程組件，將通用的穩定擴散變分自編碼器替換為MedVAE，這是一個在超過160萬醫學影像上預訓練的特定領域自編碼器，能在膝蓋MRI、大腦MRI和胸部X光中產生+2.91到+3.29 dB的PSNR改善（n = 1,820；Cohen's d = 1.37到1.86，所有p < 10^{-20}，Wilcoxon符號秩檢驗）。小波分解將優勢定位於編碼解剖學相關細微結構的最細空間頻率帶。對推理時間表、預測目標和生成架構的消融實驗確認了這一差距在正負0.15 dB內是穩定的，同時各方法之間的幻覺率仍然可比（Cohen's h < 0.02，適用於所有數據集），確立了重建保真度和生成幻覺由獨立的流程組件所支配。這些結果提供了一個實用的篩選標準：自編碼器的重建質量（無需擴散訓練即可測量）預測下游SR性能（R^2 = 0.67），這表明特定領域的VAE選擇應該在擴散架構搜索之前進行。代碼和訓練模型權重可在 https://github.com/sebasmos/latent-sr 上公開獲取。
2604.12152.author: Sebastian Cajas et.al.
2604.12152.authors: Sebastian Cajas, Ashaba Judith, Rahul Gorijavolu, Sahil Kapadia, Hillary Clinton Kasimbazi, Leo Kinyera, Emmanuel Paul Kwesiga, Sri Sri Jaithra Varma Manthena, Luis Filipe Nakayama, Ninsiima Doreen, Leo Anthony Celi
